retrieved_result: Low Concentrated Sweets Diet Low Concentrated Sweets Diet Care Notes More Overview En Espanol What is it? A Low Concentrated Sweets Diet means avoiding foods with a lot of sugar or high calorie sweeteners. Sweeteners become blood sugar (glucose) in your body. If you eat too many of these foods your blood sugar can be too high.
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses a sugar diet rather than DIY room decoration ideas; it is not relevant to the query.
